decisions: Project blocks live in .workflow/ — the project artifact directory
Block writes go through block-api.ts (readBlock/writeBlock/appendToBlock) with schema validation
Workflow SDK (workflow-sdk.ts) provides dynamic vocabulary, discovery, and spec introspection
STEP_TYPES registry in workflow-spec.ts is the single source of truth for step type validation
FILTER_NAMES exported from expression.ts derives from FILTERS keys — add a filter, SDK sees it
Subprocess thinking defaults to :off when agent spec omits thinking (Pi v0.56.0 compatibility)
record-gap tool enables agents to record gaps mid-task via appendToBlock
todos: Phase 6: Composition (workflow inheritance, nesting, custom TUI)
Implement workflow validator using SDK (validate-workflow command)
Retire demo/ directory to canonical layout (gap: retire-demo-directory)

issues.description: Expression parser: adjacent ${{ }}${{ }} in a single string can misparse (whole-value regex). Pre-existing.
10 fragility-fragility-* monitor false positives in gaps.json from workflow subprocess artifacts. Root cause: monitor-false-positives gap.

session.last_action: Post-phase-8 hardening: Pi 0.58.3 breaking changes audit (1 fix applied: thinking:off default), block-api module (readBlock/writeBlock/appendToBlock with schema validation), record-gap tool, do-gap workflow block-api migration, gap-to-phase workflow, workflow SDK (vocabulary/discovery/introspection), author-workflows skill. 590 tests, 15 resolved gaps.
